footerTagline: Premier destination for Punjabi fashion & Sikh essentials in Craigieburn, Victoria.
mapNote: Serving Craigieburn, Mickleham, Roxburgh Park, Broadmeadows and surrounds.
heroEyebrow: 🐝 Craigieburn VIC 3064 · Est. Royal Fashion Hive
heroSub: Your one-stop destination for Punjabi suits, ladies designer wear, handbags, Punjabi Jutti, and authentic Sikh essentials — right here in Craigieburn, Victoria.
aboutP1: Royal Fashion Hive is Craigieburn's premier destination for authentic Punjabi and South Asian fashion. We proudly serve the local community with a curated selection of traditional clothing, accessories, and Sikh essentials.
aboutP2: From beautifully embroidered ladies designer suits and boutique-style Punjabi wear, to handcrafted Juttis, Dumallas, and sacred Sikh items — everything is chosen with love, quality, and cultural pride.

aboutValues.title: Premium Quality
aboutValues.desc: Every item selected for fabric quality and craftsmanship.

aboutValues.title: Royal Selection
aboutValues.desc: Designer, boutique & customised styles for every occasion.

aboutValues.title: Personal Service
aboutValues.desc: Friendly team dedicated to finding your perfect look.

services.title: Ladies Designer Suits
services.desc: Exquisite suits featuring premium embroidery and luxurious fabrics — perfect for weddings, parties, and special events.

services.title: Punjabi Suits
services.desc: Traditional & contemporary Punjabi suits in cotton, georgette, silk, and chanderi for every occasion.

services.title: Boutique Style Suits
services.desc: Exclusive boutique-inspired designs blending modern aesthetics with traditional Punjabi charm.

services.title: Customised Suits
services.desc: Get the perfect fit with our tailoring service. Share your measurements for a suit made just for you.

services.title: Designer Kurte
services.desc: Stylish kurtas for everyday wear and special occasions — wide selection of prints and embellishments.

services.title: Ladies Handbags
services.desc: Stunning range of handbags, totes, clutches, and potli bags — casual to bridal.

services.title: Ladies Punjabi Jutti
services.desc: Handcrafted traditional Juttis in vibrant colours — the perfect finishing touch.

services.title: Girls Dresses
services.desc: Adorable ethnic & fusion dresses for girls — colourful, comfortable, and crafted to impress.

services.title: Bana for Men/Women/Kids
services.desc: Authentic Sikh Bana for the whole family in high-quality fabric with traditional styling.

services.title: Dumalla
services.desc: Traditional Sikh Dumalla turbans in various fabrics and colours for ceremonial occasions.

services.title: Kanga / Kara / Kirpan
services.desc: Sacred Sikh Panj Kakars available in authentic styles and premium materials.

services.title: More Coming Soon
services.desc: We're constantly expanding! Follow @royalfashionhive for new arrivals.

testimonials.name: Harpreet Kaur
testimonials.text: Absolutely love Royal Fashion Hive! Found the most beautiful Punjabi suit for my cousin's wedding. The quality is outstanding and the staff were so helpful in choosing the right design.

testimonials.name: Gurjeet Singh
testimonials.text: Best place in Melbourne for authentic Sikh essentials! Got a Dumalla, Kara, and Kirpan all in one visit. Amazing selection at very reasonable prices. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Simranpreet Dhaliwal
testimonials.text: I ordered a customised suit and was blown away by the result. It fit perfectly and the embroidery was stunning. Royal Fashion Hive truly lives up to its royal name!
